objects.name: idx_action_ts
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_action_ts ON action_log(ts DESC)

objects.name: idx_alarms_next
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_alarms_next   ON alarms(at_ts)     WHERE enabled=1 AND deleted_at IS NULL

objects.name: idx_chunks_ref
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_chunks_ref ON chunks(kind, ref_id)

objects.name: idx_chunks_unembedded
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_chunks_unembedded ON chunks(embedded_at) WHERE embedded_at IS NULL

objects.name: idx_conv_started
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_conv_started ON conversations(started_at DESC)

objects.name: idx_events_calendar
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_events_calendar ON events(calendar_id)

objects.name: idx_events_remote
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_events_remote ON events(remote_id)

objects.name: idx_events_start
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_events_start  ON events(start_ts)  WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

objects.name: idx_memory_cat
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_memory_cat    ON memory_facts(category) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

objects.name: idx_messages_conv
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_messages_conv ON messages(conv_id, ts)

objects.name: idx_notes_updated
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_notes_updated ON notes(updated_at DESC) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

objects.name: idx_reminders_due
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_reminders_due ON reminders(due_ts) WHERE fired_at IS NULL AND done=0 AND deleted_at IS NULL

objects.name: idx_sugg_day
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_sugg_day ON suggestions(created_at)

objects.name: idx_sugg_dedupe
objects.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_sugg_dedupe ON suggestions(rule_id, dedupe_key)

objects.name: idx_timers_active
objects.sql: CREATE INDEX idx_timers_active ON timers(ends_at)   WHERE canceled=0 AND fired_at IS NULL

objects.name: action_log
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE action_log(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, ts INTEGER NOT NULL, tool TEXT NOT NULL,
  summary TEXT NOT NULL, outcome TEXT NOT NULL
    CHECK(outcome IN ('executed','canceled','denied','expired','undone')),
  conv_id TEXT)

objects.name: alarms
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE alarms(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, label TEXT, at_ts INTEGER NOT NULL, rrule TEXT,
  enabled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, fired_at INTEGER,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL, deleted_at INTEGER)

objects.name: capability_misses
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE capability_misses(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, utterance TEXT NOT NULL, ts INTEGER NOT NULL)

objects.name: chunks
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE chunks(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  kind TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(kind IN ('note','message','fact')),
  ref_id TEXT NOT NULL,               -- note id / message id / memory_fact id
  conv_id TEXT,                       -- messages only
  text TEXT NOT NULL, ts INTEGER NOT NULL,
  embedded_at INTEGER)

objects.name: contacts
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE contacts(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL, deleted_at INTEGER)

objects.name: conversations
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE conversations(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, started_at INTEGER NOT NULL)

objects.name: events
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE events(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, start_ts INTEGER NOT NULL, end_ts INTEGER,
  tz TEXT NOT NULL, all_day INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, rrule TEXT, exdates TEXT,
  location TEXT, notes TEXT, reminder_min INTEGER,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL, deleted_at INTEGER, calendar_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'default', remote_id TEXT, etag TEXT, sync_status TEXT)

objects.name: feeds
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE feeds(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, url TEXT NOT NULL, category TEXT NOT NULL, enabled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1)

objects.name: memory_facts
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE memory_facts(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, category TEXT NOT NULL, fact TEXT NOT NULL,
  source_conv_id TEXT, confidence REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0.8,
  updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL, deleted_at INTEGER)

objects.name: messages
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE messages(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, conv_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES conversations(id),
  role TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(role IN ('user','assistant','tool')), content TEXT NOT NULL, ts INTEGER NOT NULL)

objects.name: notes
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE notes(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT NOT NULL, tags TEXT,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL, deleted_at INTEGER, pinned INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0)

objects.name: notes_fts
objects.sql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE notes_fts USING fts5(content, content='notes', content_rowid='rowid')

objects.name: notes_fts_config
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE 'notes_fts_config'(k PRIMARY KEY, v) WITHOUT ROWID

objects.name: notes_fts_data
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE 'notes_fts_data'(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, block BLOB)

objects.name: notes_fts_docsize
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE 'notes_fts_docsize'(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, sz BLOB)

objects.name: notes_fts_idx
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE 'notes_fts_idx'(segid, term, pgno, PRIMARY KEY(segid, term)) WITHOUT ROWID

objects.name: oauth_accounts
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE oauth_accounts(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, provider TEXT NOT NULL, address TEXT, token_ref TEXT NOT NULL)

objects.name: perf_spans
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE perf_spans(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, turn_id TEXT NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, dur_ms INTEGER NOT NULL, ts INTEGER NOT NULL)

objects.name: reminders
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE reminders(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, text TEXT NOT NULL, due_ts INTEGER NOT NULL, rrule TEXT,
  fired_at INTEGER, done INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL, deleted_at INTEGER)

objects.name: schema_version
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE schema_version(version INTEGER)

objects.name: settings
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE settings(key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT NOT NULL)

objects.name: suggestions
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE suggestions(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, rule_id TEXT NOT NULL, dedupe_key TEXT NOT NULL,
  urgency TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(urgency IN ('low','normal','time-sensitive')),
  payload TEXT NOT NULL,              -- SuggestionDTO JSON
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, shown_at INTEGER,
  outcome TEXT CHECK(outcome IN ('acted','dismissed','snoozed','expired')),
  acted_at INTEGER)

objects.name: sync_queue
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE sync_queue(
  op_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  calendar_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  event_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  op TEXT NOT NULL,
  payload TEXT,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL
)

objects.name: sync_state
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE sync_state(
  calendar_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  sync_token TEXT,
  last_sync_ts INTEGER
)

objects.name: timers
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE timers(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, label TEXT, ends_at INTEGER NOT NULL,
  canceled INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, fired_at INTEGER, created_at INTEGER NOT NULL)

objects.name: todos
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE todos(
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, content TEXT NOT NULL, due_ts INTEGER,
  done INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at INTEGER NOT NULL, updated_at INTEGER NOT NULL, deleted_at INTEGER)

objects.name: undo_log
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE undo_log(id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, turn_id TEXT NOT NULL, tool TEXT NOT NULL, payload TEXT NOT NULL, created_at INTEGER NOT NULL)

objects.name: usage_log
objects.sql:
CREATE TABLE usage_log(
  day TEXT NOT NULL, provider TEXT NOT NULL, metric TEXT NOT NULL,
  amount REAL NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY(day, provider, metric))

objects.name: vec_chunks
objects.sql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vec_chunks USING vec0(chunk_id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, embedding float[384])

objects.name: vec_chunks_chunks
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE "vec_chunks_chunks"(chunk_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,size INTEGER NOT NULL,validity BLOB NOT NULL,rowids BLOB NOT NULL)

objects.name: vec_chunks_info
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE "vec_chunks_info" (key text primary key, value any)

objects.name: vec_chunks_rowids
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE "vec_chunks_rowids"(rowid INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,chunk_id INTEGER,chunk_offset INTEGER)

objects.name: vec_chunks_vector_chunks00
objects.sql: CREATE TABLE "vec_chunks_vector_chunks00"(rowid PRIMARY KEY,vectors BLOB NOT NULL)

objects.name: notes_ad
notes_ai
notes_au
